allow: PowerShell("--- COM ports ---"; [System.IO.Ports.SerialPort]::GetPortNames\(\); "--- Ports/Serial/Arduino/CH340 devices \(present\) ---"; Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly | Where-Object { $_.Class -eq 'Ports' -or $_.FriendlyName -match 'Arduino|CH340|CH341|USB-SERIAL|Serial|FT232' } | Select-Object Status,Class,FriendlyName,InstanceId | Format-List; "--- Problem/unknown devices ---"; Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly | Where-Object { $_.Status -ne 'OK' } | Select-Object Status,Class,FriendlyName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell("--- COM ports ---"; [System.IO.Ports.SerialPort]::GetPortNames\(\); "--- CH340 / USB-SERIAL 裝置狀態 ---"; Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly | Where-Object { $_.InstanceId -match 'VID_1A86' -or $_.FriendlyName -match 'CH340|USB-SERIAL|Serial' } | Select-Object Status,Class,FriendlyName,InstanceId | Format-List)
